requirements.full_sentence: 1.2.1 The currency chests should invariably report all transactions through ICCOMS on the same day by 9 PM by uploading data through the Secured Website (SWS) to their respective link offices.
requirements.object: through ICCOMS on the same day by 9 PM by uploading data through the Secured Website (SWS) to their respective link

requirements.full_sentence: Link offices should invariably report the consolidated position to the Issue Offices latest by 11 PM on the same day.
requirements.object: position to the Issue Offices latest by 11 PM on the same day

requirements.full_sentence: 1.2.2 The Sub-Treasury Offices (STOs) should report all transactions directly to the Issue Office of the Reserve Bank by 11 PM on the same day.
requirements.object: to the Issue Office of the Reserve Bank by 11 PM on the same day

requirements.full_sentence: However, Reserve Bank may at its discretion grant appropriate grace period in the matter of levy of penal interest.
requirements.object: appropriate grace period in the matter of levy of penal interest

requirements.full_sentence:
Particular care should be taken to ensure that remittances of
fresh notes/notes to the currency chests are not reported as 'deposit' transactions in the Link Office Statements.
requirements.object: that remittances of fresh notes/notes to the currency chests are not reported as 'deposit' transactions in the Link Office Statemen

requirements.full_sentence:
1.5 Reporting of Soiled note remittances to RBI / diversion to other chests
Soiled note remittances to RBI /diversion to other currency chest/s should not be shown as withdrawal by chest/s / link offices.

1.6 Reporting of diversions in ICCOMS
As regards reporting of diversion/s in ICCOMS, they must be reported in the column "2A and 4 A" i.e.
the chest receiving the diversion should report under 2 A and the remitting chest should report the amount under 4A in the chest slip without any delay.
requirements.object: and the remitting chest should report the amount under 4A in the chest slip without any delay

requirements.full_sentence: Diversion amounts, even to the chest of the same bank should not be reported under "Withdrawal" and "Deposit" columns i.e.

Rate of penal interest
Penal interest shall be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest balances.
requirements.object: rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible a

requirements.full_sentence:
Levy of penal interest in respect of currency chests at treasuries
The above instructions shall be applicable to currency chests at treasury/sub-treasury offices also.

5.1 As the sole criterion for levy of penal interest for delayed reporting is the number of days of delay, there should ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision in individual cases.
requirements.object: for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision in individual cases

requirements.full_sentence: However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced by chests especially in hilly/remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc., may be made to the Issue Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the bank concerned within a month from the date of debit of the bank concerned.
requirements.object: Issue Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the bank concerned within a month from the date of debit of the bank co
